evidence.claim: UAE Ministry of Foreign Affairs officially announced a food security partnership with Kenya Ministry of Agriculture, per official statement.
evidence.snippet: MOFA officially announced the UAE-Kenya food security corridor

evidence.claim: ADQ committed AED 500m to Kenyan agri-processing ventures in an investor presentation.
evidence.snippet: ADQ earmarks AED 500m for East African agri-processing

evidence.claim: UAE MOFA and Kenya agriculture ministry signed the food security corridor MoU, government PDF published.
evidence.snippet: MoU signed on food security corridor

evidence.claim: DP World expanded Mombasa port logistics capacity in 2024 under an earlier concession.
A think-tank report says Masdar is evaluating geothermal projects in the Kenyan Rift Valley.

edges.claim: UAE MOFA and Kenya Ministry of Agriculture signed a food security corridor MoU (officially announced).
ADQ committed AED 500m to Kenyan agri-processing ventures.
Masdar evaluating Rift Valley geothermal projects with KenGen.
Co-mentioned in the same evidence record (E4) — plausible unstated relationship.
